deckConstruction.spellDeckRule: All nonland cards from the two selected archetypes.
deckConstruction.landDeckRule: All basic land cards from the two selected archetypes.

runtimeNotes: Use card.gameText as the functional rules text for this game.
Do not use planeswalker targeting in this prototype.
Ward is a mandatory additional cost, not a triggered counter effect.
Menace uses the custom simplified rule from the ruling document.
The land deck is separate from the spell deck.
